name: Albany
author: soccerjonj
description:
Custom map of the Albany, NY area and surrounding areas such as Troy, Schenectady, etc. Generated using 2023 LODES Census Data and added demand for the following:

Universities/Colleges: University at Albany, Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute, Union College, Skidmore College, Siena University, Russell Sage College, Maria College, SUNY Albany, Hudson Valley Community College, Schenectady County Community College, Excelsior College

Entertainment: Joseph L. Bruno Stadium, MVP Arena, Tom & Mary Casey Stadium
